name: zephyr-mf-transfers-app-demo-9
description: Rsbuild Module Federation example with Zephyr

scripts.install-deps: pnpm -C apps/balances install && pnpm -C apps/consumer install && pnpm -C apps/ledge install && pnpm -C apps/reports install && pnpm -C apps/settings install && pnpm -C apps/shared-ui install && pnpm -C apps/transfers install && pnpm install
scripts.build: pnpm build-shared-ui && pnpm build-transfers && pnpm build-balances && pnpm build-reports && pnpm build-ledger && pnpm build-settings && pnpm build-consumer
scripts.dev-apps: pnpm --filter=transfers-app11 dev & pnpm --filter=balances-app11 dev & pnpm --filter=reports-app11 dev & pnpm --filter=ledger-app11 dev & pnpm --filter=settings-app11 dev & pnpm --filter=consumer-shell11 dev
scripts.dev: pnpm --filter=shared-ui-app11 dev & pnpm --filter=transfers-app11 dev & pnpm --filter=balances-app11 dev & pnpm --filter=reports-app11 dev & pnpm --filter=ledger-app11 dev & pnpm --filter=settings-app11 dev & pnpm --filter=consumer-shell11 dev
